label: Mendelian dyad test result
description: transmission_p + consistency_p + per-candidate detail rows for one parent × offspring dyad

label: Mendelian triad test result
description: consistency_p + 1:2:1 chi-square + per-candidate detail for parent_a × parent_b → offspring

label: Cohort Mendelian scan scores
description: 4-stage hierarchical scoring across candidate × triad cross-product; one score per candidate

label: Compatibility search result
description: Per-partner verdict (ideal/good/possible/unknown/reject) + per-inversion detail for a focal individual

label: BDMI screen result (per inversion candidate)
description: Per-candidate row: 6 atomic test outcomes + confidence level (weak/moderate/strong/very_strong/validated)

label: Linked inversion regime test result
description: For a focal candidate: per-partner row with 3×3 joint table, Cramér's V, mutual information, missing recombinant count, conditional combined p, verdict

label: Drive vs underdominance mechanism
description: Per-cross-type aggregate; mechanism label + confidence + parent_allele_bias + mean_het_deficit

label: Single CO / DCO / C / I result
description: r1, r2, r12, C = r12/(r1·r2), I = 1−C — pure formula on user input. Latent d, x NOT estimated.

label: NCO/Mb per-window track
description: Per-chromosome per-window NCO rate (p map). GATED on ngsTracts NCO caller.

label: CO/(NCO+CO) per-window track
description: Per-chromosome per-window CO share (x map). GATED on ngsTracts per-dyad CO + NCO calls.

label: 2D coefficient-of-coincidence heatmap
description: C = r12 / (r1·r2) across window pairs on one chromosome. GATED on ngsTracts DCO calls.

label: Inversion signature verdict
description: Per-candidate inside-vs-flank ratios + verdict (CONSISTENT / REJECT_NO_CO_SUPPRESSION / ANCIENT_COLD_REGION / AMBIGUOUS). GATED on ngsTracts.

label: Focal inversion × meiosis scan result
description: Per tested-chromosome row: delta_C, p_perm, status, intra/inter relation. Plus causal-ladder level, confounder profile, per-family direction, negative-control p_outside. GATED on ngsTracts per-dyad CO calls.

label: Pass-1 → Pass-2 priority table
description: One row per inversion: priority_score + bucket (SHIP_TO_PASS2 / HOLD / DROP). Composite of intra effect (0.30), inter effect (0.25), Mendelian distortion (0.20), family consistency (0.15), marker readiness (0.10). GATED.

label: Interchromosomal marker panel design
description: Three sections: focal-inversion-state markers (tag SNPs + breakpoint markers) + transmission/recombination markers on tested chroms + test-design summary with expected_DCO. GATED on ngsTracts for expected-power numbers.
